headline: 暑期档火热：新片激战，火遮眼领跑
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up: New Films Battle, 'Fire Shrouds the Eyes' Leads
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：暑期档新片激战，火遮眼成今日最热，痴迷本周持续霸榜。本周五部新片上映，多部续集与原创作品竞争激烈。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Summer blockbuster battle heats up, with 'Fire Shrouds the Eyes' trending today and 'Obsession' dominating the week. Five new films released this week, with intense competition among sequels and originals.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片零部今日上映，但周末票房可期。
industryHighlights.en: No new films released today, but weekend box office looks promising.

industryHighlights.text: 火遮眼口碑发酵，成为今日黑马。
industryHighlights.en: 'Fire Shrouds the Eyes' gains word-of-mouth momentum, becoming today's dark horse.

industryHighlights.text: 痴迷连续多日霸榜，下周恐遇强敌。
industryHighlights.en: 'Obsession' dominates charts for days, faces tough competition next week.

industryHighlights.text: 安昂传奇与蜘蛛侠新作即将上映，影迷期待。
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and new Spider-Man film upcoming, fans excited.
